name: primitive_int_array_empty_stays_fallback
description: M3d FALLBACK: int field with EMPTY ARRAY input []. coerce_array_to_singular on zero items is BAML's error_unexpected_empty_array, so the required field (and the parse) errors. Native models it as a provenError (which wraps the fallback sentinel), so native DECLINES the whole parse rather than claim the error -> fall back. want live-captured from BAML final parse.
